'''Gysk''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kadas'sa'Nikto/Legends|Kadas'sa'Nikto]] [[Terrorist/Legends|terrorist]] who was supplying ordnance for a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] terror net on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], he was captured by [[Omega Squad]] during a [[Traffic Interdiction Operations|TIOPS]] [[Mission to the Corellian-Perlemian Intersection|mission]] in the [[Tynna sector/Legends|Tynna sector]]. Gysk was later unsuccessfully interrogated by the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Walon Vau]] and then [[Death/Legends|executed]], along with his accomplices [[Farr Orjul]] and [[M'truli]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
